sql_array: CREATE TABLE test_table (id SERIAL PRIMARY KEY, ts_1 TIMESTAMP WITH TIME ZONE, ts_2 TIMESTAMP WITH TIME ZONE, inet_addr INET);
INSERT INTO test_table (ts_1, ts_2, inet_addr) VALUES (timestamp '2021-12-31 18:40:40', timestamp '2021-02-20 16:30:20', inet '192.168.1.5');
INSERT INTO test_table (ts_1, ts_2, inet_addr) VALUES (NULL, timestamp '2021-04-01 12:00:00', inet '192.168.1.6');
INSERT INTO test_table (ts_1, ts_2, inet_addr) VALUES (timestamp '2020-01-01 00:00:00', NULL, inet '192.168.1.7');
SELECT id, timestampdiff_quarter(ts_1, ts_2) AS quarter_diff FROM test_table WHERE inet_addr < inet '192.168.1.6' AND ts_1 IS NOT NULL;
SELECT id, timestampdiff_quarter(ts_1, ts_2) AS quarter_diff FROM test_table WHERE ts_1 < timestamp '2021-01-01 00:00:00' AND ts_2 IS NOT NULL;
SELECT id FROM test_table WHERE (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM test_table t2 WHERE t2.inet_addr < inet '192.168.1.8') > 0;
SELECT id FROM test_table WHERE timestampdiff_quarter(ts_1, ts_2) = 2 AND inet_addr < inet '192.168.1.6' GROUP BY id HAVING COUNT(*) > 0;
SELECT id, timestampdiff_quarter(ts_1, ts_2) AS quarter_diff, inet_addr FROM test_table ORDER BY timestampdiff_quarter(ts_1, ts_2) DESC;
SELECT id, timestampdiff_quarter(ts_1, ts_2) FROM test_table WHERE timestampdiff_quarter(ts_1, ts_2) IS NOT NULL HAVING timestampdiff_quarter(ts_1, ts_2) < 3;
UPDATE test_table SET ts_1 = timestamp '2023-12-31 00:00:00' WHERE inet_addr < inet '192.168.1.6';
DELETE FROM test_table WHERE ts_1 IS NULL OR timestampdiff_quarter(ts_1, ts_2) IS NULL;
CREATE TEMPORARY TABLE temp_table AS SELECT id, inet_addr FROM test_table WHERE ts_1 < ts_2;
INSERT INTO temp_table (id, inet_addr) SELECT id, inet_addr FROM test_table WHERE inet_addr < inet '192.168.1.5';
